reason: Window model + lib.rs setup changes (show main, hidden overlay, commands); keep lib.rs thin and follow conventions.

Adding Settings.activeBuildOverride is a cross-layer contract change (settings.rs serde + TS type) — keep in lockstep.
MainWindow shell + pages reuse shadcn primitives/tokens; overlay-scoped behaviors per the UI system.
